human_pending_gates: Packaged GUI click-through on the installed app (queue/pause/notifications/completion/interrupted). NOT auto-run: the built app has no data-dir override, so launching it would run the startup reconciliation sweep against real ~/LecturePackData jobs — declined to protect real data.
Live beta.2 -> beta.3 install-over upgrade on a disposable Windows profile/VM (data preservation).
Live fake-feed / real-feed updater click-through in the packaged window (logic covered by 22 updater tests).
recommendation: Add a LECTUREPACK_DATA_DIR env override (paths.data_dir + ConfigManager default) so packaged GUI acceptance can run against a disposable profile without risking real data.
outcome: B — all machine-verifiable release gates pass; named packaged-GUI + live-upgrade validations remain (same disclosure posture as beta.1/beta.2).
